headline: Allstate and U.S. Men's National Team midfielder Tyler Adams unveil mini-pitch in Atlanta to expand youth access to soccer
summary: Allstate, alongside the U.S. Soccer Foundation and U.S. Men's National Team midfielder Tyler Adams, announced the opening of a new mini-pitch at Sandtown Park in South Fulton, Georgia. Designed as a hard-court space for pickup games and organized play, the mini-pitch is part of a multi-year collaboration to expand access to soccer and create safe, engaging spaces for communities to come together.
